sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79527" key="pare/yhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρέψησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ἕψὠ</foreign> <sense id="n79527.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἕψησις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2450.tlg001:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Palaeph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
